facebook.caption: If you're looking for a beachfront base that genuinely earns its five-star reputation, InterContinental Phu Quoc Long Beach Resort delivers on every count. Set along Bãi Trường, one of the island's longest and most beautiful stretches of sand, this resort combines chic rooms and suites with multiple pools, polished dining options, and a rooftop bar that draws guests and visitors alike. With 6,487 reviews averaging 4.8 out of 5, the praise is well-earned. Practical tip: book a sea-view room for sunrise, and make time for the rooftop bar at sunset. Two golden moments, one stay.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the light hit that infinity pool and you'll understand why InterContinental Phu Quoc Long Beach Resort sits at 4.8 stars. Sweeping Bãi Trường views, cocktails above the treetops, and rooms that make it genuinely hard to leave. This is what a Phu Quoc splurge looks like done right.

instagram.caption: Beachfront luxury on Bãi Trường, Phu Quoc's finest stretch of sand. InterContinental Phu Quoc Long Beach Resort brings chic rooms, dreamy pools, and a rooftop bar to the table. Rated 4.8/5 across 6,487 reviews. Yeah, it lives up to the hype.
instagram.video_caption: Pool. Beach. Rooftop bar with endless ocean views. InterContinental Phu Quoc Long Beach Resort on Bãi Trường is doing luxury the right way. 4.8 stars, 6,487 guests can't be wrong.

tiktok.caption: This Phu Quoc resort is giving infinity pools, rooftop sunsets & beachfront vibes on Bãi Trường. 4.8 stars for a reason. #PhuQuoc #LuxuryTravel #VietnamTravel #BeachResort

video_script.cta: Save this for your Phu Quoc trip
